name: agent-doc-rules
description: Reusable documentation and AGENTS.md rules for AI-assisted repositories

scripts.test:links: lychee --offline --no-progress --exclude-path '(^|/)node_modules/' -- README.md AGENTS.md CHANGELOG.md docs/**/*.md packages/**/*.md e2e/**/*.md
scripts.test:static: corepack pnpm run test:markdown && corepack pnpm run test:links && corepack pnpm run test:audit
